releases.name: RAG citation policy v3
releases.change_summary: Tightened citation formatting and moved abstention copy into a shared response template.

releases.name: Governed agent approval audit patch
releases.change_summary: Added stricter approval audit fields for external seller notices.

incidents.title: Canary answered a restricted finance question without enough citation evidence
incidents.summary: A canary response mixed a finance retention answer with an employee-visible explanation instead of abstaining.
signals: finance-retention citation appeared for an employee role
eval regression reproduced in targeted canary slice

incidents.title: Canary p95 latency rose after citation template change
incidents.summary: Latency increased but no safety or side-effect boundary failed.
signals: no unsafe leak failures in the latency-only slice

cases.name: employee finance abstention
cases.details: Employee path returned finance answer instead of abstaining.

cases.name: citation-required answer shape
cases.details: Answer omitted the required citation object after template refactor.

cases.name: seller notice approval gate
cases.details: External seller notice still requires supervisor approval.

cases.name: citation template latency budget
cases.details: p95 exceeded the canary latency budget.

runbooks.title: Secure RAG regression triage
steps: compare retrieval filters before and after the release
prove unauthorized evidence is blocked before generation

runbooks.title: Canary rollback
steps: attach failing eval IDs to the incident record

runbooks.title: Latency investigation
steps: separate model latency from retrieval and response formatting
keep safety gates active while optimizing
